spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and ensure immutability.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor with final fields for repositories.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Introduce the new Spring Boot 3.2+ JdbcClient API alongside the existing JdbcTemplate approach.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Added import and constructor parameter for StudentJdbcClientRepository.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Rename logger field to uppercase constant to follow standard Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed 'logger' to 'LOGGER' and updated all usages.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Update import to reflect the renaming of the JdbcTemplate-based repository class.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed import from StudentJdbcRepository to StudentJdbcTemplateRepository.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add demonstration code in CommandLineRunner to showcase the usage of the new JdbcClient API.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add a method using Java 15+ text blocks to generate a JSON string representation of the student object.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Removed unused SLF4J Logger and LoggerFactory imports to clean up the code.
Removed the unused logger field instance that was previously initialized.
Standardized indentation from tabs to spaces for the remaining fields and methods.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getters, setters, constructors, and toString methods.
Delete explicit getter, setter, constructor, and toString implementations now handled by Lombok.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.human_impl: removed public Long getId() { return id; }

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Add @NonNull annotations to generic type parameters to satisfy stricter null-safety requirements in the upgraded Spring Data ecosystem.
Import the @NonNull annotation from the org.jspecify library to support the new null-safety annotations.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern Spring Boot testing standards.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Changed imports from org.junit.Test to org.junit.jupiter.api.Test and replaced @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class).

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Adjust code indentation to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent formatting.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Replaced tab characters with spaces in the method body indentation.

Remove import for @Autowired annotation as it is no longer used in the class.
Move main method to the end of the class for better code organization.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Moved public static void main method from top to bottom of class.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Add a log statement to print all users after performing CRUD operations.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate code generation.
Remove manual getters, setters, constructors, and toString method in favor of Lombok annotations.
Add @NonNull annotations from org.jspecify to generic type parameters to support stricter null-safety checks in newer Java/Spring versions.
